qry:select.name: QRY_RECIBO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, PEM.oi_per_emp_ddo, PEM.e_numero_legajo, PEM.c_empresa, PEM.c_personal, PEM.d_ape_y_nom, PEM.f_ingreso, PEM.f_egreso, PEM.c_nro_cuil AS nro_cuil, PEM.c_convenio, PEM.c_categoria_ult as c_categoria, PEM.f_nacim, ORG22_EST_CIVIL.d_estado_civil, PEM.c_nro_documento, PEM.c_tipo_documento, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PEM, ORG22_EST_CIVIL JOIN LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PEM.oi_per_emp_ddo, PEM.c_estado_civil LEFT OUTER ORG22_EST_CIVIL.c_estado_civil WHERE LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per = {#SOURCE:@oi_tot_liq_per} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DOMICILIO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_calle, PER01_DOMIC_PER.e_numero, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_piso, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_departamento, PER01_DOMIC_PER.c_postal, PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_localidad FROM PER01_PERSONAL, PER01_DOMIC_PER JOIN PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal = {#PARAM:@c_personal} AND PER01_DOMIC_PER.l_domic_fiscal = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_localidad
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_localidad, ORG35_PROVINCIAS.d_provincia FROM ORG19_LOCALIDADES, ORG35_PROVINCIAS JOIN ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_provincia INNER ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_provincia WHERE ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad = {#PARAM:@oi_localidad} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_CATEGORIA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ94_CATEG.d_categoria FROM LIQ94_CONVENIOS, LIQ94_CATEG, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION WHERE LIQ94_CONVENIOS.oi_convenio_ddo = LIQ94_CATEG.oi_convenio_ddo AND LIQ94_CONVENIOS.c_convenio = {#PARAM:@c_convenio} AND LIQ94_CATEG.c_categoria = {#PARAM:@c_categoria} AND LIQ94_CONVENIOS.oi_codif_ddo = LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_codif_ddo AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DETALLE1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT TLP.e_secuencia, CLP.oi_conc_liq_per, CON.c_concepto, CON.d_concepto, CLP.n_valor AS valor , CLP.n_cantidad AS cantidad , CON.c_tipo_concepto FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS TLP, liq20_conc_liq_per AS CLP, liq96_conceptos AS CON, LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS TC JOIN TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CLP.oi_tot_liq_per , CON.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CLP.oi_concepto_ddo, TC.c_tipo_concepto INNER CON.c_tipo_concepto WHERE TLP.oi_tot_liq_per = {#PARAM:@oi_tot_liq_per} and CON.ca_fig_recibo != \'N\' and CLP.n_valor!=0 and TC.l_nolistado = 0 and CON.c_tipo_concepto = \'1\' ORDER BY c_concepto ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DETALLE2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT TLP.e_secuencia, CLP.oi_conc_liq_per, CON.c_concepto, CON.d_concepto, CLP.n_valor AS valor , CLP.n_cantidad AS cantidad , CON.c_tipo_concepto FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS TLP, liq20_conc_liq_per AS CLP, liq96_conceptos AS CON, LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS TC JOIN TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CLP.oi_tot_liq_per , CON.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CLP.oi_concepto_ddo, TC.c_tipo_concepto INNER CON.c_tipo_concepto WHERE TLP.oi_tot_liq_per = {#PARAM:@oi_tot_liq_per} and CON.ca_fig_recibo != \'N\' and CLP.n_valor!=0 and TC.l_nolistado = 0 and (CON.c_tipo_concepto=\'0\' or CON.c_tipo_concepto=\'2\' or CON.c_tipo_concepto=\'8\') ORDER BY c_concepto ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DETALLE3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT TLP.e_secuencia, CLP.oi_conc_liq_per, CON.c_concepto, CON.d_concepto, CLP.n_valor AS valor , CLP.n_cantidad AS cantidad , CON.c_tipo_concepto FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS TLP, liq20_conc_liq_per AS CLP, liq96_conceptos AS CON, LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS TC JOIN TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CLP.oi_tot_liq_per , CON.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CLP.oi_concepto_ddo, TC.c_tipo_concepto INNER CON.c_tipo_concepto WHERE TLP.oi_tot_liq_per = {#PARAM:@oi_tot_liq_per} and CON.ca_fig_recibo != \'N\' and CLP.n_valor!=0 and TC.l_nolistado = 0 and (CON.c_tipo_concepto = \'3\' or CON.c_tipo_concepto = \'7\') ORDER BY c_concepto ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_REMUNERACIONES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TLP.n_totpag as total, TLP.n_totsret AS rem, (TLP.n_totnsret + TLP.n_totasig + TLP.n_totant) AS norem, (TLP.n_totant) AS anti, (TLP.n_totdesc + TLP.n_totemb) AS retenciones FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP WHERE TLP.oi_tot_liq_per = {#PARAM:@oi_tot_liq_per} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_FAMILIAR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER15_TIPOS_FAM.d_tipo_familiar, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.d_ape_y_nom, PER20_TIPOS_DOC.c_tipo_documento, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_nro_documento, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.f_nacimiento FROM LIQ97_FLIARES_PER, PER15_TIPOS_FAM, PER20_TIPOS_DOC JOIN LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_tipo_familiar INNER PER15_TIPOS_FAM.c_tipo_familiar, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_tipo_documento LEFT OUTER PER20_TIPOS_DOC.c_tipo_documento WHERE LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_per_emp_ddo} AND LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.l_vive = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_REMUNERACION
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_sbasico FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER where LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per = {#PARAM:@oi_tot_liq_per} ')/ROWS/ROW
